canonical_definition: The latent ability to correctly order multiple responses based on their relative quality (e.g., faithfulness or correctness) rather than assigning absolute scores.
papers: CompKBQA: Component-wise Task Decomposition for Knowledge Base Question Answering

definitions.text: The degree to which a model correctly orders responses according to their ground truth human preference labels, reflecting the alignment between model outputs and desired response rankings.
